name: 9' Pre-Lit Slim Douglas Fir Artificial Christmas Tree White Led Lights Connected Pole - Wondershop™
description:
Create a timeless holiday centerpiece with this 9-Foot Pre-lit Slim Douglas Fir Artificial Christmas Tree with White LED Lights from Wondershop™. This artificial tree showcases a green faux Douglas fir tree in a slim silhouette with white LED lights. The pre-lit tree is poised on a 4-footed metal base for easy placement and stands nine feet tall, lending a standout accent to your holiday decor. Keep it in your living room dressed up with colorful ornaments, a gleaming angel topper and festive garland for truly magical vibes.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
